concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Charlie Parker Memorial Concert
Bel Canto Foundation Jazz Concert to Benefit Musicians

about_quotes.speaker: John Malachi
about_quotes.evidence: They even had Baby Laurence, the dancer, they had him on there. Because Baby Laurence used to make sessions with the musicians. It was just like another instrument. I think he's the greatest tap dancer I've ever seen.

about_quotes.speaker: Tiny Grimes
about_quotes.evidence: we didn't have the good dancers because 'cause Baby Laurence was one of the greatest dancers in the world

about_quotes.speaker: Mary Lou Williams
about_quotes.evidence: She had a couple of people like Baby Laurence or something like that, or some other dancer.

about_quotes.speaker: Louie Bellson
about_quotes.evidence: He was in a class with Baby Laurence, Teddy Hale, Bojangles, Bill Robinson.
about_quotes.doc_title: Louie Bellson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: I had Baby Laurence, I had -- ... I had Eddie Rector and Baby Laurence
